shortDescription: UKVI Standard Visitor · Tourism, family, business · 6-month stay

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Standard Visitor visa fee (£115 for 6 months) on gov.uk before quoting clients.

alert.title: Genuine visitor intent
alert.body: Officers assess whether applicant will leave UK after visit. Weak ties to India and vague purpose are top refusal reasons.

about.label: Description
about.value: Standard Visitor visa for tourism, visiting family/friends, or short business activities in the UK. Most Indian applicants apply online and attend VAC biometrics.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Temporary visit purpose · Funds for trip · Strong ties to India · Genuine intention to leave UK · Clean immigration history

about.label: No work or long-term study
about.value: Visitors cannot work or access public funds. Short courses up to 6 months may be permitted—verify rules.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: UK Visas and Immigration (UKVI) — Home Office

about.label: After approval
about.value: Visa vignette in passport; entry decision at border. Respect visit duration—overstay affects future applications.

eligibility.note: Tourism, family, or permitted business activity
Cover trip cost or credible sponsor

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, review refusal letter grounds. Do not reapply with same weak ties evidence without material improvement.

redFlags.title: Weak ties to India
redFlags.description: Unemployed, no assets, vague return plan.
redFlags.fix: Employment letter, business proof, property, family obligations

redFlags.title: Insufficient funds
redFlags.description: Cannot explain trip funding or recent large deposits.
redFlags.fix: Bank history, ITR, sponsor letter with host support if applicable

redFlags.title: Purpose mismatch
redFlags.description: Tourism application with unclear activity or long stay without reason.
redFlags.fix: Realistic itinerary; explain duration; host invitation for family visits

redFlags.title: Immigration history concerns
redFlags.description: Prior overstays or refusals from UK/allies.
redFlags.fix: Honest disclosure; legal advice if complex

redFlags.title: Cover letter too generic
redFlags.description: Template letter not matching client profile.
redFlags.fix: Personalised letter with specific dates, purpose, and ties

faqs.q: Can we guarantee visitor visa approval?
faqs.a: No. UKVI decides each case on merits. We strengthen documentation but never promise approval.

faqs.q: How much funds to show?
faqs.a: Enough to cover flights, accommodation, and daily expenses. No fixed amount—must be credible for trip duration.

faqs.q: Is invitation letter required?
faqs.a: Recommended for family visits. Host should provide invitation, status proof, and accommodation details.

faqs.q: Can visitor switch to student visa in UK?
faqs.a: Generally cannot switch from visitor to student inside UK—apply from outside. Verify current rules.

faqs.q: How long can visitor stay?
faqs.a: Usually up to 6 months per visit on standard visitor visa. Officer may grant shorter period.

faqs.q: Does prior Schengen refusal affect UK visa?
faqs.a: Must disclose all refusals. UKVI considers overall immigration history.

faqs.q: Can visitor work?
faqs.a: No paid or unpaid work except limited permitted business visitor activities.

faqs.q: Priority service available?
faqs.a: Check gov.uk for current priority/super priority options and VAC availability in India.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Standard Visitor visa for tourism, visiting family/friends, or short business activities in the UK. Most Indian applicants apply online and attend VAC biometrics.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Temporary visit purpose · Funds for trip · Strong ties to India · Genuine intention to leave UK · Clean immigration history

faqs.q: What is No work or long-term study for this service?
faqs.a: Visitors cannot work or access public funds. Short courses up to 6 months may be permitted—verify rules.

faqs.q: Important note on No work or long-term study?
faqs.a: Visitors cannot work or access public funds. Short courses up to 6 months may be permitted—verify rules.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: UK Visas and Immigration (UKVI) — Home Office

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Visa vignette in passport; entry decision at border. Respect visit duration—overstay affects future applications.

faqs.q: Is Valid passport required?
faqs.a: Valid passport is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Clear visit purpose required?
faqs.a: Tourism, family, or permitted business activity

faqs.q: Is Proof of funds required?
faqs.a: Cover trip cost or credible sponsor

faqs.q: Is Strong ties to India required?
faqs.a: Employment, business, property, family

faqs.q: Is Accommodation and travel plans required?
faqs.a: Itinerary or host invitation

faqs.q: Is Biometrics completed required?
faqs.a: Assess whether Biometrics completed is satisfied for this case.

faqs.q: Is No prior immigration breaches undisclosed required?
faqs.a: No prior immigration breaches undisclosed is typically required.

faqs.q: What is the Processing time?
faqs.a: 3–6w — Standard visitor outside UK

faqs.q: What is the Government fee?
faqs.a: £115 — 6-month visit (2026)

faqs.q: What is the Our approval rate?
faqs.a: 74% — ~62% industry benchmark

faqs.q: What is the Required docs?
faqs.a: 9 — + invitation if applicable

faqs.q: What is the Consultancy fee?
faqs.a: See fee tab — + govt only

faqs.q: What if the client has Weak ties to India?
faqs.a: Employment letter, business proof, property, family obligations

faqs.q: Why is Weak ties to India a problem?
faqs.a: Unemployed, no assets, vague return plan.

faqs.q: What if the client has Insufficient funds?
faqs.a: Bank history, ITR, sponsor letter with host support if applicable

faqs.q: Why is Insufficient funds a problem?
faqs.a: Cannot explain trip funding or recent large deposits.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent on file before application
Separate consultancy and UKVI fees in quotes
Do not advise working in UK on visitor visa
proTips: For family visits, collect host's BR status proof and invitation
Show employment leave letter even for tourism
Keep trip duration realistic for stated purpose
Save refusal letters for future reapplication strategy
postApproval: Explain visit duration and no-work rule
Remind client to carry supporting documents to border
Note reapplication rules if visit purpose changes later

changelog.summary: Expanded FAQs to 30 counselor Q&A pairs.

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Expanded quiz to 75 levelled questions (25 per level).

changelog.summary: Initial UK Standard Visitor counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Parents visiting children in UK need strong India ties—property and spouse in India critical.

quiz.question: Standard Visitor visa (6 months) fee approx (2026)?
quiz.explanation: Verify on gov.uk visa fees page.

quiz.question: Top refusal reason for Indian visitors?
options: Passport colour
Weak ties / not genuine visitor
Wrong photo size only
Hotel brand
quiz.explanation: Officers must be satisfied applicant will leave UK.

quiz.question: Can Standard Visitors work in UK?
options: Yes, full-time
No
Yes, if invited
Only remote
quiz.explanation: Work not permitted on visitor route.

quiz.question: Family visit applications benefit from:
options: No documents
Host invitation and ties evidence
Guaranteed approval letter
Employment in UK
quiz.explanation: Invitation and host status strengthen purpose.

quiz.question: After refusal, best practice:
options: Reapply same day unchanged
Address refusal grounds before reapplying
Hide prior refusal
Guarantee next approval
quiz.explanation: Material improvement needed for reapplication.
